banner.tagline: Create engaging, AI-powered quizzes from your notes or documents in seconds — effortlessly and accurately.

sections.overviewHeading: What you can do with GenQuiZ

generate.heading: AI-Powered Quiz Generation
generate.para: Paste your study notes or articles and let our AI instantly craft accurate, relevant questions tailored to your content.

parse.heading: Parse from Aiken Format
parse.para: Already have questions in Aiken format? Paste them in and jump straight into quiz mode.

cloud.heading: Load from Cloud
cloud.para: Sign in to access and retake quizzes you've previously generated — anytime, anywhere.

generate.placeholder: Paste your notes, textbook excerpts, or articles here — GenQuiZ will do the rest...

parse.pasteLabel: Paste your questions in Aiken format:
parse.placeholder: Paste your Aiken-formatted questions here and we'll parse them instantly...

quiz.emptyState: No questions found. Please generate a quiz or parse one from text first.

result.heading: Your Results
result.subheading: Review your answers below. Correct answers are highlighted.
